calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Geoffrey Adams appearing via zoom for Akram Omari (Successor trustee).

Mr. Adams addressed the issue of whether there is any reason to give notice to the two beneficiaries who were given zero percent of the trust. Mr. Adams also stated that they have been unable to reach Jeffrey Cudd and that if they are required to serve him, they would have to do it by publication. The Court waives service of notice of the two heirs. Mr. Adams stated that the business was a corporation that was suspended, but Mr. Cudd kept operating it in the name of the trust, that it is still only in his name as a DBA (doing business as) and that only one check was issued one week before he died in the amount of $140,000.00 to the IRS (Internal Revenue Services). In addition, Mr. Adams stated that for some reason the IRS is still holding the check, that if they put it through, they would not have this problem and that the IRS did not tell them anything except there is a penalty of $20,000.00 which they have requested a waiver of. The matter was taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Feb-28-2023 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
